title: Cuneiform Tablet #0429: Early Dynastic Divinatory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Early Dynastic period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Early Dynastic period. Divinatory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records divinatory matters typical of Early Dynastic period administrative or literary practice.
